_doc: Reconnaissance config for ScaNavi. Repo: https://github.com/michielinksee/VINOX

health._note: ScaNavi is mobile-first (Expo). Web preview URLs go here as they exist. Production mobile build is monitored via Google Play Console / App Store separately.
health._fail_open_note: Mobile-first product. Some web preview URLs may not be live yet. Treat 4xx/5xx as warning, not critical, until web product surface stabilizes.

snapshot._note: Tier B-β: pending stable web URL. ScaNavi is mobile-first (Expo) — web preview at scanavi.expo.app currently 404. Re-enable when web surface stabilizes (Tier C visual regression for mobile screens via Detox or Appium is a separate track).

agent_voice_probe._note: Tier B-γ infrastructure ready. Disabled until ScaNavi web chat API has a stable production URL. Probe queries below are pre-defined per docs/specs/chat-recommendation.md §5 — flip enabled=true once the URL endpoint is confirmed.

probes.name: chat: 辛口の重いの → recommendation pattern
chat: ありえない銘柄なんとか → no-match fallback

body.message: ありえない銘柄なんとか

warning: health.url returns 4xx (treat as warning given fail_open)
